summary: Russell arrives at Silverstone buoyed by his Austrian masterclass, seeking to capitalize on Mercedes' momentum against Hamilton's Ferrari resurgence on home soil. Hamilton's commanding practice and sprint pole position signal Ferrari's strength on the high-speed layout, setting up a fierce battle between the Brackley and Maranello machines across the weekend. A strong British Grand Prix result would provide either driver crucial championship breathing room as the season reaches its pivotal midpoint.
